introSection: Super Grover's Box Car Derby, originally known as Shamu Express, was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA. The ride is currently in storage.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Shamu Express was announced on December 15, 2003.

The roller coaster was refurbished and reopened as Super Grover's Box Car Derby with the park on February 23, 2019.

The ride closed in 2024 and is reportedly in storage at the park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features a simple oval layout. It has pink track and green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains have a shark theme.

fullText:
Super Grover's Box Car Derby, originally known as Shamu Express, was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA. The ride is currently in storage.

Shamu Express was announced on December 15, 2003.

The roller coaster was refurbished and reopened as Super Grover's Box Car Derby with the park on February 23, 2019.

The ride closed in 2024 and is reportedly in storage at the park.

The ride features a simple oval layout. It has pink track and green supports.

The trains have a shark theme.
